sigWerErrors.reason: The only difference is the omission of the inverted question mark, which is a punctuation mark and does not affect meaning.
'El agente' (the agent) and 'la gente' (the people) are completely different in meaning; this changes who is supposed to contact the speaker, significantly altering the meaning of the sentence.
